events.title: Globalschism
events.raw_text: Globalschism 7-9 PM Secret Nightclub Globalschism (The Beach) "Globalschism" is a meta look at the environmental and human destruction caused by globalism. Based on the largest ship breaking yard in the world in Alang, India, the very ships that deliver detritus around the world ironically end up being detritus themselves. Inside the ship is an intimate nightclub.

events.title: The First Supper - An Alchemical Tasting and Tea Ceremony

location_match.location_name: Bombay Beach Museum of Bombay Beach

events.raw_text: The First Supper - An Alchemical Tasting and Tea Ceremony by Salina Moore, Resurrectress 8-10 PM The First Supper A 13 Course tasting menu of culinary bites, tinctures, and teas, guiding participants through an alchemical process of redemption and renewal. All are invited to the table. Bring a chair! (Limited to 75 people) Eden in The Apocalypse and The Alchemy of Repair by Phoenix Goodman, Salina Moore 8-10 PM The First Supper A philosophical inquiry on the esoteric symbolism of Bombay Beach; Alchemy, Repair and Renewal. Participants and speakers are invited.
